newRelay.title: New relay
newRelay.agentRelayIdHint: (must match the id in RELAY_INSTANCES, e.g. public, private, paid)
newRelay.errRequired: Fill in name, agent URL, token, and agent relay ID
newRelay.errTokenLen: Token must be at least 8 characters

footer.agentTitle: relay-agent via GET /health (selected relay or first relay)
footer.agentTitleLanding: relay-agent version from public GET /health (AGENT_PUBLIC_HEALTH_URL or default)

metrics.uniquePubkeysTitle: Unique pubkey count from a strfry sample (kinds 0, 1 and 3; event cap on the agent).

dashboard.noDataSelect: No data. Select a relay with events.
dashboard.sampleFooter: Based on the same sample of {count} events.
dashboard.sampleFooterKinds: Based on a sample of {count} events.
dashboard.sampleHint: Sample of the relay’s most recent events.
dashboard.strfryVersionHint: Version of the strfry binary bundled in relay-agent. Relay containers may run a different version.
dashboard.groupAddressableDescription: All addressable kinds (30000–39999) in this sample.
dashboard.groupEphemeralDescription: All ephemeral kinds (20000–29999) in this sample.
dashboard.groupUnknownDescription: Kinds without a dedicated label in this dashboard (aggregated).
dashboard.groupAddressableHint: Sum of addressable events (30000–39999) in this sample.
dashboard.groupEphemeralHint: Sum of ephemeral events (20000–29999) in this sample.
dashboard.groupUnknownHint: Kinds outside ephemeral and addressable ranges without a dedicated badge.
dashboard.groupRowExpandHint: Click the row to expand or collapse.

events.relayLmdb: Relay unavailable (LMDB). strfry may be locked or maxreaders too low. Check strfry.conf on the server and raise maxreaders.
events.agentNoResponse: The agent did not respond. It may be busy or the request took too long. Try refreshing.
events.timeout: The request took too long. The relay may have many events. Try again.
events.badGateway: Proxy or agent unavailable. Check the connection to relay-agent.

health.agentUnavailable: Agent unavailable{suffix}. relay-agent is not responding; check that it is running and the proxy routes correctly.
health.agentTimeout: Agent timed out{suffix}. relay-agent took too long.
health.badGateway502: 502 Bad Gateway{suffix}. relay-agent may be offline or the proxy is misconfigured.
health.serviceUnavailable503: 503 Service unavailable{suffix}. relay-agent may be offline or unhealthy.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Preferences stored only in this browser.
profile.nip07Failed: Could not read pubkey from the extension.
profile.nip07InvalidResponse: The extension did not return a valid hex pubkey.
profile.nip46WaitHint: Scan the QR code or open the link in your remote signer app, then approve the connection.
profile.nip46NoRelays: No relays for your account. Create a relay first.
profile.nip46BridgeError: Could not resolve the NIP-46 bridge WebSocket. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_RELAY_BRIDGE_WSS if needed.
profile.nip46ConnectFailed: Could not start the NIP-46 session.
profile.nip46RemotePubkeyMissing: Session is active but the signer public key was not received. Approve in the signer app first, then try again.
profile.nip46Timeout: Timed out waiting for the remote signer.

help.title: Help & docs
help.intro: Links and a quick reference for operators.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: Install relay-agent and register your relay in the panel.
onboarding.tokenHint: Use the same value for RELAY_AGENT_TOKEN on the agent and when adding the relay.
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.agentRelayIdSubtext: required — same id as in RELAY_INSTANCES (e.g. public)
onboarding.probeFail: Connection failed. Check agent URL, token, and agent_relay_id.
onboarding.successBody: You can manage your relay in the panel.

hero.kickerA: relay-agent multi-relay (npm / GHCR) · MIT · Open Source
hero.title: Manage your Nostr relay without touching the terminal
hero.subtitle: Visual dashboard for relay operators — moderation, access control, Lightning and multi-relay management in one place.
hero.docsTrail: — bitmacro.io through relay-agent, with NIP-07 and NIP-46 authentication (complements the panel → relay-api → agent path in this repo’s README).
hero.imageAlt: BitMacro Relay Manager — Dashboard with relay table, sidebar and status badges

problem.title: Running a Nostr relay today means…
problem.footerA: No visual tool exists for this.
problem.p1: Managing whitelists via bash scripts in the terminal
problem.p2: Inspecting events with CLI (strfry scan, nak req)
problem.p3: Deleting spam manually by event ID
problem.p4: Implementing a paid relay with custom code per installation

features.title: Everything you need to run a relay
features.f1d: Events, DB size, uptime, activity by kind
features.f2d: Whitelist/blocklist with one click, no SSH
features.f3d: Automatic access after payment, LNbits webhook
features.f4d: Manage N relays from one agent instance

quickstart.title: Up and running in 3 steps
quickstart.s3body: Create a relay in the panel, paste your agent URL and token. Done.

ConfigTab.title: relay-agent endpoint
ConfigTab.confirmDelete: Delete this relay? This action cannot be undone.

errors.timeoutColdStart: Timeout exceeded. The API may be in cold start. Try again.
errors.agentRelayIdRequired: Agent Relay ID is required (RELAY_INSTANCES id).

probe.handlerTimeout: The API proxy took too long to respond{elapsed}. Check latency to relay-api.
probe.relayNotFound: Relay not found in database{elapsed}. Confirm the relay is configured in relay_configs.
probe.status502: Proxy returned 502 Bad Gateway{elapsed}. relay-agent may be offline or the reverse proxy (nginx/openresty) is not forwarding correctly. Check: 1) docker ps | grep relay-agent 2) curl http://localhost:7810/health 3) proxy upstream configuration.
probe.status503: Service unavailable (503){elapsed}. relay-agent may be starting, unhealthy, or the proxy cannot connect to upstream.
probe.status401: Invalid token (401){elapsed}. The Bearer token in Config does not match RELAY_INSTANCES in the agent.
probe.status404: Invalid Agent Relay ID (404){elapsed}. The value "{detail}" does not exist in RELAY_INSTANCES. Confirm the id in the agent.

errors.requiredFields: Fill name, agent URL, token, and agent relay ID
errors.nameMaxLength: Name must have at most 100 characters
errors.tokenMinLength: Token must have at least 8 characters

titles.nip05: NIP-05 identifier (not verified in real time)

placeholders.search: Search by name, npub or hex...

empty.noExtraUsers: No extra users in this sample.
empty.noEntries: No entries. No users in this sample.

errors.invalidPubkey: Invalid pubkey. Use hex (64 chars) or npub1...

filters.authorTitle: Shows npub or hex; API requests always use hex.

modals.blockDescription: Removes all events from this pubkey and prevents future publications.

blockModal.title: Mark as spam?
blockModal.description: Removes all events from this pubkey and blocks future publications from it on this relay.

hints.loginToMemorize: Sign in to memorize this filter.
